ddls:
CREATE TABLE "music_tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each music track */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the music track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the track belongs to */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the track belongs to */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity of the track (based on user engagement) */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the track contains explicit content */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the music track */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_music_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_music_tracks_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_music_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's image */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "formation_year" INTEGER /* Year the artist started their career */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL to the album cover art */,
  "record_label" TEXT /* Record label that released the album */,
  "number_of_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "subgenres" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of subgenres */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_features" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the music track */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the track */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the track */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Musical key of the track */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track (major or minor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the playlist was created */,
  "public_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the playlist is public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_followings" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist followed by the user */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date when the user started following the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the music track reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was posted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_reviews_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES music_tracks ("track_id")
)
